title: User Account Management UI Flows
interaction_flow_change_username: UIWindowChangeUsername: validates new_username (shows error if empty)
[OIDC-only path] UIWindowChangeUsername → myOpenRevalidatePopup(): called when oidc_only && !revalidated && !password
myOpenRevalidatePopup → openRevalidatePopup(revalidateUrl): opens OIDC popup, disables button, shows hint text
openRevalidatePopup → myOpenRevalidatePopup: resolves (or throws on failure)
[on failure] myOpenRevalidatePopup → onError(message): show error, re-enable button
[res.ok] UIWindowChangeUsername → onSuccess(): show success msg, clear inputs, update_username_in_gui(new_username), window.user.username = new_username
[after revalidation] UIWindowChangeUsername → doSubmit(): retry POST (no password body)
interaction_flow_change_password: UIWindowChangePassword: validates passwords match (shows i18n('passwords_do_not_match') on mismatch)
[OIDC-only path] UIWindowChangePassword → myOpenRevalidatePopup(): called when oidc_only && !revalidated && !current_password
[Standard path] UIWindowChangePassword → doSubmit({current_password, new_password}): POST /user-protected/change-password {password: current_password, new_pass: new_password}
[res.ok] UIWindowChangePassword → onSuccess(): show success msg, clear inputs, re-enable
interaction_flow_save_account: Caller → UIWindowSaveAccount(options): opens modal, returns Promise<bool>
UIWindowSaveAccount → UIWindow({app:'save-account', dominant:true}): renders form (username, email, password)
User → UIWindowSaveAccount: fills username, email, password, clicks 'Create Account'
UIWindowSaveAccount: disables button + inputs, blurs fields
UIWindowSaveAccount → APIServer: $.ajax POST /save_account {username, email, password, referrer, send_confirmation_code} (Bearer auth_token)
UIWindowSaveAccount: hides form, shows success panel
User → UIWindowSaveAccount: clicks OK on success panel
[API error] UIWindowSaveAccount: shows err.responseText, re-enables button + inputs
key_relationships: UIWindowChangeUsername depends_on update_username_in_gui (DOM update after success)

steps: resolves revalidateUrl from param or window.user.oidc_revalidate_url

shared_pattern_doSubmit.auth_strategy: session cookie (no Authorization header) for user-protected endpoints

oidc_branching_logic.upfront_revalidation: if oidc_only && !revalidated && !password → open popup BEFORE first submit
oidc_branching_logic.server_triggered_revalidation: if API returns code='oidc_revalidation_required' + revalidate_url → open popup and retry submit
oidc_branching_logic.ui_difference: OIDC users: password input hidden; non-OIDC users: OIDC wrap hidden

api_endpoints: POST /user-protected/change-username — body: {new_username, password?} — auth: session cookie
POST /user-protected/change-password — body: {password?, new_pass} — auth: session cookie
POST /save_account — body: {username, email, password, referrer?, send_confirmation_code?} — auth: Bearer auth_token
important_notes: UIWindowSaveAccount wraps everything in a Promise; resolves true on success, false on close/cancel, is_verified if email confirmation needed
UIWindowChangeUsername/Password share identical myOpenRevalidatePopup + doSubmit + onSuccess/onError patterns
Two OIDC revalidation trigger paths: pre-submit (oidc_only flag) and post-submit (server returns oidc_revalidation_required)
UIWindowSaveAccount fires 'account-saved' CustomEvent on window after success
Bot-trap field (p102xyzname) present in SaveAccount form
